title: Developing the Factors of Enlightenment
justification: This talk provides the most complete and systematic coverage of all seven factors of enlightenment, explaining each factor clearly while demonstrating how they work together in practice. It combines excellent pedagogical structure with engaging personal anecdotes (the Depressives Anonymous story), practical meditation guidance, and accessible explanations of how these factors balance each other. The talk flows naturally from guided meditation through theoretical explanation to practical application, making it ideal as a spine for the chapter.
summary: Bhante Bodhidhamma systematically explains the seven factors of enlightenment—awareness, investigation, effort, interest, calmness, concentration, and equanimity—showing how they arise naturally when awareness is properly established. The talk combines guided meditation practice with clear teaching on how these factors balance each other and lead to insight.

relevance.note: Directly develops all seven factors of awakening
